remember: Students will be able to recall the functions and duties of a director in a company.
Students will be able to list the roles and responsibilities of a director in a company.
Students will be able to define the powers and liabilities of a director in a company.
understand: Students will be able to explain the importance of the board of directors in a company.
Students will be able to describe the different types of directors in a company.
Students will be able to understand the concept of independent directors in a company.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of directing to real-life business scenarios.
Students will be able to analyze the role of a director in decision-making processes.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of a director's actions on the company's performance.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of a director in a company.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a director's leadership style.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of corporate governance on the role of a director.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the functions and duties of a director in a company.
To describe the characteristics of an effective director.
To explain the importance of corporate governance in the role of a director.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the powers and liabilities of a director in a company.
To explain the role of a director in the decision-making process of a company.
To analyze the impact of a director's actions on the company's performance.
